meaning: adj.发嗓音的,声音的,有声的,歌唱的n.元音,声乐作品
examples: She loved singing as a child and started vocal training at 12.
If a singer coughs, this can result in the bruising of the vocal cords.
Orbison's vocal range spanned three octaves.
Luckily, "her vocal cords are not involved with the tumor, " according to her mother.
Neither will lots of others, especially vocal college students who are every bit as dedicated.
